creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:

> 60 processes:  1 running, 59 sleeping
> CPU:  0.5% user,  0.0% nice,  0.5% system,  0.0% interrupt, 98.9% idle
> Mem: 25M Active, 1276M Inact, 64M Laundry, 410M Wired, 154M Buf, 139M Free
> ARC:

> Swap: 4096M Total, 4096M Free


Seems this was fixed earlier and merged into stable/11 but it's now back.
See bug #220996

I see this on 14.0, have not tried other versions.
